name: test_sort_by_an_integer_expression_in_descending_order[(a.num2 + (a.num * 2)) * -1 DESCENDING]
description: /Users/dpp/*project/newdb/cyphertck/gdm-tck/features/0-original/clauses/with-orderBy/WithOrderBy2.feature: [4] Sort by an integer expression in descending order
descriptionHtml: /Users/dpp/*project/newdb/cyphertck/gdm-tck/features/0-original/clauses/with-orderBy/WithOrderBy2.feature: [4] Sort by an integer expression in descending order
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Expected results but query failed: Query execution failed: {code: Neo.ClientError.Statement.SyntaxError} {message: Invalid statement syntax: cypher:  --> 3:40
  |
3 |   ORDER BY (a.num2 + (a.num * 2)) * -1 DESCENDING
  |                                        ^---
  |
  = expected kw_and, kw_or, kw_xor, kw_limit, kw_skip, kw_in, kw_is, query_mid_clause, query_action, string_cmp_expr, prop_access, map_projection, subscript, cmp_op, add_op, mul_op, or sort_dir}
Cypher: MATCH (a)
WITH a
  ORDER BY (a.num2 + (a.num * 2)) * -1 DESCENDING
  LIMIT 3
RETURN a
